_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organization objectives, leadership priorities, and decision-making risks.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI governance structures, including model risk management, AI lifecycle oversight, accountability assignment, and the organizational conditions that enable responsible AI deployment at scale.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-001 (RM, cosine: 0.510), RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.508).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.527). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [decision, leadership, making, objectives, organization, priorities] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, ai, assignment, conditions, deployment, enable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.894 (P=0.918, R=0.871). P exceeds R by 0.047 — the DCWF element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.6%, N:66.2%, C:33.2%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of organization objectives, leadership priorities, and decision-making" vs "Knowledge of AI governance structures, including model risk management, AI lifec" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.527 (gap 0.012). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [decision, leadership, making, objectives, organization, priorities]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, ai, assignment, conditions, deployment, enable].
